representative.intent: Preserve every material founder promise and explicit non-goal in the generated build-ready product brief.
representative.observed: The founder explicitly prohibited investor material, but the generated brief contains no corresponding non-goal (citations FR01-1 and FR01-2).
representative.gap: Add a traceable clause stating that the product produces a build-ready product brief and must not produce investor material or a pitch deck.
representative.applicabilityReason: The evaluated artifact is a generated product brief, and no evidence indicates that the founder superseded the non-goal.
representative.uncertainty: None material; the two allowed evidence items meet the minimum count and directly establish the omission.

representative.intent: Stop generation and ask a plain-language question before resolving any unsettled material decision.
representative.observed: The brief introduced team accounts, collaborator invitations, and recurring billing even though these decisions were absent from the founder memo; the product then emitted the final brief without asking about them (citations FR02-1 and FR02-2).

locator.element: Generate final brief button and resulting document

representative.gap: Before final generation, stop and ask the founder to decide account type, collaboration boundaries, and billing model; do not present those assumptions as founder decisions.
representative.applicabilityReason: Material product-boundary and commercial-model decisions were unresolved in the founder source but selected in the generated brief (citation FR02-1).
representative.uncertainty: None material; two allowed evidence items establish both the unresolved assumptions and the failure to ask.

representative.intent: Give every material output clause a segment-level citation that opens the exact supporting source location.
representative.observed: All nine generated sections use the same document-level link, and none identifies a line, paragraph, or exact excerpt (citation FR03-1).
representative.gap: Replace generic file links with a distinct source citation for every material clause, identifying the exact line, paragraph, or excerpt.
representative.applicabilityReason: The generated brief contains nine sections with material product clauses, and the evidence does not identify them as pending AI proposals (citation FR03-1).
representative.uncertainty: None material; the allowed git evidence meets the minimum count and directly describes citation granularity.

representative.intent: Enable a first-time non-technical product owner to reach a useful draft within five minutes without recovery assistance or prompt terminology.
representative.observed: A clean-browser first-time run completed all seven required actions in 3 minutes 42 seconds without assistance or recovery (citation UX02-1).
representative.gap: No minimum-boundary gap. Exceptional quality is not established because the evidence does not show that the owner correctly explained the result.
representative.applicabilityReason: The evidence explicitly records a clean-browser, first-time task on the primary completion path (citation UX02-1).
representative.uncertainty: The run supports good quality; whether the owner could correctly explain the result is not evidenced.
